name: Memory
purpose: What has been learned through incidents. Accumulates, never shrinks. Rules derived from past failures.
canonical_vocabulary: Runbook + Postmortem archive + Lessons learned + Knowledge base
ownership_principle: Each entry is tied to an originating incident. No speculative rules. Entries cross-reference the features/tasks/findings they derived from.

target_blocks.name: feedback-memory.json
target_blocks.notes: target: canonicalize the ~/.claude/.../memory/feedback_*.md corpus as a queryable block with incident cross-references

target_blocks.name: postmortems.json
target_blocks.notes: target: structured postmortem records with cross-references to the incidents they analyze
